Run one-shot DB diagnoses (opendbx-specific)

Usage:
  opendbx diag [command]

Available Commands:
  lock-wait   Diagnose lock waits
  slow-sql    Diagnose slow SQL

Flags:
  -h, --help   help for diag

Global Flags:
  -d, --debug string        Enable debug mode with optional category filtering (e.g., "api,hooks" or "!1p,!file")
      --debug-file string   Write debug logs to a specific file path (implicitly enables debug mode)
      --verbose             Override verbose mode setting from config

Use "opendbx diag [command] --help" for more information about a command.
